summary: Iteration 93 - Home vs Dashboard Tab Separation Testing Complete. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend Agent Terrain Dashboard verified: Home tab (Accueil) shows greeting card, sync status, quick stats, and USSD-style menu (1-6 items). Dashboard tab (Tableau) shows detailed KPIs with objectives and progress bars. Tabs are properly separated with different content. Menu item navigation works correctly (1->Planteurs, 3->Inscriptions, 5->/guide-redd). Farmer Dashboard correctly redirects non-farmer users.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/field-agent/my-farmers returns 200 with farmers list
PASS: GET /api/agent/search?phone=xxx returns 200 with found boolean
PASS: GET /api/agent/search without phone returns 422 (validation error)
PASS: All protected endpoints return 401/403 without auth
PASS: Frontend MobileAppShell loads with data-testid='mobile-app-shell'
PASS: Home tab shows USSD menu with 6 items (data-testid='agent-ussd-menu')
PASS: Home tab shows greeting card 'Bonjour, {name}'
PASS: Home tab shows sync status (data-testid='sync-status-home')
PASS: Home tab shows quick stats (Visites/Planteurs/Parcelles)
PASS: Home tab header is hidden (title=null)
PASS: Dashboard tab shows KPI cards (data-testid='dashboard-kpi-cards')
PASS: Dashboard tab shows header with user name
PASS: Home and Dashboard tabs have different content (properly separated)
PASS: Menu item 1 (Mes Planteurs) switches to Planteurs tab
PASS: Menu item 3 (Inscrire) switches to Inscriptions tab
PASS: Menu item 5 (Pratiques Durables) navigates to /guide-redd
PASS: Farmer Dashboard redirects non-farmer users to homepage

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Home vs Dashboard separation features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 93 verified the Home vs Dashboard tab separation for Agent Terrain. Key findings: 1) Agent Terrain now has 5 tabs: home (Accueil), dashboard (Tableau), farmers (Planteurs), inscriptions (Inscrire), search (Chercher). 2) Home tab shows USSD-style menu with 6 numbered items, greeting card, sync status, and quick stats. Header is hidden on Home tab. 3) Dashboard tab shows detailed KPIs (Visites SSRTE, Membres Inscrits, Parcelles Declarees, Photos Geoloc.) with objectives and progress bars, alerts, risk distribution. Header is visible on Dashboard tab. 4) Menu item actions work: item 1 -> Planteurs tab, item 3 -> Inscriptions tab, item 5 -> /guide-redd page. 5) Farmer profile forms (ICI, SSRTE, REDD, Parcelles, Photos, Register) are defined in code with proper data-testids but couldn't be tested as admin has no assigned farmers. 6) Farmer Dashboard correctly redirects non-farmer users.
